calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Off Calendar

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Continued To May-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Continued To May-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Adams for Elizabeth Howe.

The Court noted that the Probate Examiner's notes that were extensive and sent out some time ago have not been responded to. Mr. Adams stated that he filed declarations in response to items 1, 2 and 3 raised in the examiner's notes, that he does not agree with the Court's position regarding appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem for the Minor and raised the issue of changed circumstances for modification of the trust for Edward Yip. The Court informed Counsel that things need to be followed pursuant to code, that items 1 and 3 through 6 still need to be resolved, and stated that they need someone who is legally empowered to act on behalf of the Minor. The Petition to Modify Trust, etc. is continued to May 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that this will be the last continuance and that if the issues have not been addressed, it will take the matter off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Adams for Elizabeth Howe (Petitioner).

Mr. Adams stated that he filed responsive pleadings on November 8th and that he did not deliver a copy to the Examiner. The Petition to Modify Yip Family Trust, etc. is continued to November 29, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Adams was directed to provide courtesy copies to Room 202 addressed to the Examiner.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Continued To Nov-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Continued To Oct-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Adams for Elizabeth Howe (Petitioner).

The Court informed Counsel that he needs to file a response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Adams stated that he has not filed a response and addressed the issue of his Client's Son having a Guardian Ad Litem appointed stating that he does not think it should be required given what the Trust provides for. Mr. Adams was told to put it in his response. The Petition to Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust for Disabled Beneficiary is continued to October 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Continued To Jul-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust B Into Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Continued To Jul-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Adams for Elizabeth Howe (Petitioner).

Mr. Adams stated that the remainder beneficiaries waived notice, that they have no problem with modifying the special needs trust for their brother, that he has a declaration from the adult brother (Sterling), that he has a declaration from the mother of Maximilian (Minor) where she waives notice and that he does not feel a Guardian Ad Litem is necessary. Mr. Adams also stated that there is no way the mother can recover any funds from this trust, that funds go the brothers if Edward dies, that he can give notice to the Department of Health Care Services, that obtaining proof of disability is problematic due to HIPPA, that Edward is in bad health and can not go to the Doctor, that they are trying to obtain documents from the Physician or Social Security, and requested a 30-day continuance. The Petition to Modify Yip Family Trust B, etc. is continued to July 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

There being no appearance and Counsel's repeated failure to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes, the Second Amended Petition to Modify The Yip Family Trust, etc. was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition To Modify Yip Family Trust Into A Supplemental Needs Trust For Disabled Beneficiary Edward
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The Court stated that this matter has been trailing since December 2009, that there have been 16 hearing dates on this matter and that Counsel has failed to respond to the Examiner's notes. Therefore, the matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Continued To Sep-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alec Adams for Elizabeth Howe.

The Court stated that there was no response to the Examiner's notes dated June 29, 2010. Mr. Adams stated that he was having difficulty with interpreting the pertinent statute regarding exemption transfers and disqualification in the Trust, that money will be deposited into the supplemental Special Needs Trust (SNT) and that it had to be done in a way that would not disqualify Edward Yip from receiving SSI benefits. In addition, Mr. Adams stated that he filed exhibits/declarations in support of the modification on May 11, 2010 and that the language needs to be proper. The Court stated that the Examiner's notes needed to be cleared up, suggested that Mr. Adams communicate with the Examiner and make sure he complies with all the current defects so that the petition can be pre-granted. The matter was continued to September 1, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
